title: Permission-gate the tool registry
description: Tools are registered with explicit capability and permission metadata, and the loop checks permission before any invocation.
body: Use when adding tools an agent can call or wiring the dispatch layer. Do not let the agent invoke an arbitrary function by name, and avoid registering a side-effecting tool without a permission flag. Actions: register each tool with its capability, side-effect class, and required permission; check permission at dispatch; deny-by-default for unregistered names. Validation signals include a test that an unregistered tool name is rejected and that a side-effecting tool without granted permission is denied. Risk boundary: an agent able to call a write/delete/external tool with no permission check is a critical finding requiring a human gate.
